title: delegation — subprocessors
description: This module publishes NO subprocessors. The two aggregates (role_delegations + impersonation_sessions) are pure DB rows managed inside the Stackra trust boundary; no third-party processor receives their contents. External Slack + PagerDuty deliveries for impersonation-related notifications DO reach subprocessors but those subprocessors are owned by notifications module + on-call transport respectively, so they are declared there — not duplicated here.
future: If a security-team SIEM (Splunk, DataDog Security, Panther) subscribes to the impersonation audit stream via webhook or S3 export, that subprocessor is documented HERE at that time. Wave 2 open door.
If a compliance-evidence archival provider (Vanta, Drata) subscribes to the audit stream, same declaration.
